channel.title: Naija Digest Online
channel.description: Nigeria’s one-stop hub for breaking news, tech, football, celebrity gossip, Naija music, live TV, exchange rates and trending topics.

item.title: Maracana Stadium to Host Nathaniel Idowu Summer Camp
item.dc:creator: ThisDay
item.description: The rejuvenated Maracana Sports Complex in Ajegunle, Lagos will host the  maiden Nathaniel Idowu Summer Camp, organised by the Nathaniel Idowu Foundation, from August 3 to 28, 2026. According to

item.title: Experts eye N31trn pensions fund for oil and gas operators
item.dc:creator: Tribune
item.description: Financial experts are looking at the institutional capital market in Nigeria, of which Pension Fund forms about two-third at N31trillion as at June 2026 to fund the new generation of oil and gas operators. They are suggesting a purposeful vehicle that will allow the investment of a sizable percentag

item.description: The FIFA World Cup 2026 reaches its penultimate stage this week as four of international football’s biggest nations battle for two places in the final, with France, Spain, England and

item.description: Nigeria and Galatasaray top striker, Victor Osimhen, has hinted that he’s still aiming to return to school and earn a university degree. The former Napoli forward who dropped out of

item.title: Colombian national killed by ICE agent during operation in Maine
item.dc:creator: BBC News World
item.description: It comes less than a week after an undocumented migrant was fatally shot in Houston by an immigration agent.

item.title: Lookman Back in Atletico Pre-season Training, Wolves Leave out Arokodare

item.description: Duro Ikhazuagbe  After resting well from a hectic season for both country and club, Ademola Lookman yesterday returned to pre-season training with Spanish La Liga side, Atletico Madrid. The return

item.title: India’s Youngest Airline Seeks Funds as Iran War Drives Up Costs
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg Markets
item.description: Akasa Air is looking to raise 10.5 billion rupees ($110 million) through equity and debt, people familiar with the matter said, as India’s youngest airline seeks funds to overcome challenges brought on by the Iran war.

item.dc:creator: The Sun

item.dc:creator: The Sun
item.description: Managing Director and Chief Executive Officer of Footstool Estates Limited, Tpl. Fanda Zichat Augustine, has identified weak policy reforms, public-private pact and high cost of construction as factors affecting affordable housing. item.dc:creator: ThisDay

item.title: Globacom rewards top dealers
item.dc:creator: The Sun

item.description: Governor Seyi Makinde of Oyo State has called for an independent international investigation into the abduction of pupils and teachers in Oriire Local Government Area, urging relevant United Nations human rights and accountability mechanisms to scrutinise the circumstances surrounding the attack and

item.title: Oyo police arrest suspect, recover pistol, drugs during stop-and-search
item.dc:creator: The Sun
item.description: Operatives of the Oyo State Police Command have arrested a suspect and recovered a locally fabricated pistol, a live cartridge and suspected illicit drugs during a stop-and-search operation in the Bodija area of Ibadan. The post Oyo police arrest suspect, recover pistol, drugs during stop-and-search

item.title: Gombe police move to prevent farmers-herders clashes
item.dc:creator: The Sun
item.description: The Gombe State Police Command has intensified efforts to prevent farmers-herders clashes by convening key stakeholders to identify the root causes of the conflict and develop practical solutions before tensions escalate. The post Gombe police move to prevent farmers-herders clashes appeared first o

item.title: Benue killings: Traditional ruler orders armed herders, terrorists to vacate Otukpo land
item.dc:creator: The Sun
item.description: Following Sunday’s deadly attack on Otukpo Nobi community in Otukpo Local Government Area of Benue State, the Och’Otukpo Odu, Chief John Eimonye, has ordered all armed herders and terrorists to vacate every part of Otukpo land with immediate effect. The post Benue killings: Traditional ruler orders

item.title: 56 days with kidnappers: Oyo principal recounts ordeal
item.dc:creator: The Sun
item.description: The harrowing details of the victims’ 56-day captivity emerged yesterday as the rescued pupils and teachers were formally handed over to the Oyo State Government by the military. The post 56 days with kidnappers: Oyo principal recounts ordeal appeared first on The Sun Nigeria.

item.dc:creator: Tribune

item.title: Access code: ADC kicks as INEC debunks Bala’s claim
item.dc:creator: Daily Trust
item.description: The Independent National Electoral Commission (INEC) has dismissed as false, the claim by a factional leader of the African Democratic Congress (ADC), Nafiu Bala, that he had obtained the commission’s access code and uploaded the party’s candidates for the 2027 general election. The claim, which has

item.title: Oriire abduction: Children were beaten, teachers chained — Alamu, Principal
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: THE principal bducted alongside teachers, students and pupils in Oriire Local Government Area of Oyo State, Mrs Racheal Alamu, yesterday, recounted the harrowing 56-day ordeal in captivity, revealing that children were beaten into silence, male teachers chained and blindfolded.... item.dc:creator: Al Jazeera
item.description: US President Donald Trump says the US should be paid by ‘rich’ oil-producing Gulf nations to secure the Strait of Hormuz

item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:

item.title: 2027: Kano gov retains deputy, Garo as running mate
item.dc:creator: Daily Trust
item.description: Kano State Governor, Abba Kabir Yusuf, has announced the nomination of his deputy, Murtala Sule Galadima Garo, as his running mate for the 2027 governorship election. The announcement was made during a strategic meeting with federal political appointees at the Kano Governor’s Lodge in Abuja. Accordi

item.title: APC stakeholders petition Tinubu over Jos North assembly primary
item.dc:creator: Daily Trust
item.description: Concerned stakeholders of the All Progressives Congress (APC) from Jos North–North State Constituency in Plateau State have appealed to President Bola Ahmed Tinubu to intervene and stop an attempt to undermine the outcome of the party’s primary election in the area. In an open letter jointly signed

item.dc:creator: Daily Trust
item.description: The Speaker of the Nasarawa State House of Assembly, Rt. Hon. Dr. Danladi Jatau, has accepted his defeat in the All Progressives Congress, APC primary election for Karu/Keffi/Kokona Federal Constituency. The Speaker was defeated by another member of the state assembly, Hon. Daniel Oga Ogazi (Kokona

item.title: LPP launches digital membership portal
item.dc:creator: Daily Trust
item.description: The Liberation People’s Party (LPP), said it has launched its digital membership registration portal as part of efforts to commence full political operations. The development followed a Court of Appeal judgment affirming LPP status as a registered political party in Nigeria. In a statement by LPP’s

item.title: 'Hero, legend, sweetheart': Tributes to Jurassic Park actor Sam Neill, who has died aged 78
item.dc:creator: BBC News World
item.description: Friends, politicians and fellow film stars remember Neill following his "sudden and unexpected" death.

item.dc:creator: The Sun
item.description: The National President of the Police Officers’ Wives Association (POWA), Olufunmilola Disu, has urged women to embrace skills development and emerging technologies, particularly Artificial Intelligence (AI), as pathways to economic empowerment and self-reliance. item.title: Record El Niño threatens to unleash floods across East Africa and Asia
item.dc:creator: Al Jazeera
item.description: Aid groups warn a record-strength El Niño could unleash flooding and hunger from Somalia to Pakistan.

item.title: Price hike looms as Dangote begins sale of PMS, diesel in dollars
item.dc:creator: Daily Trust
item.description: Fresh concerns have emerged over a possible increase in petrol price and renewed pressure on the naira following reports that Dangote Petroleum Refinery may begin selling refined petroleum products in U.S. dollars. The development comes amid renewed tensions in the Middle East, which have pushed glo

item.title: Nigeria imports $1bn worth of fish annually — Dangote
item.dc:creator: Daily Trust
item.description: President of the Dangote Group, Alhaji Aliko Dangote, has expressed concern over Nigeria’s continued dependence on imported fish, disclosing that the country spends about $1 billion annually on fish imports despite its abundant marine and inland water resources. He said the rising import bill unders

item.title: China Airline Shares Face More Profit Pain as Demand Stays Weak
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg Markets
item.description: Shares of China’s major airlines are lagging Cathay Pacific Airways Ltd. by nearly 50 percentage points this year, as analysts expect weaker profits to persist on lackluster domestic travel demand.

item.title: ValueJet to add Boeing aircraft, eyes regional expansion
item.dc:creator: Daily Trust
item.description: Nigerian carrier ValueJet has announced plans to introduce Boeing aircraft into its fleet as part of an expansion strategy aimed at increasing capacity and extending its network across Africa. The airline said the acquisition marks the next phase of its growth, enabling it to serve more passengers,

item.title: FG unveils food procurement guidelines for MDAs
item.dc:creator: Daily Trust
item.description: The Federal Government on Monday unveiled the National Guidelines for Public Procurement of Food and Related Services to standardise food purchases across ministries, departments and agencies (MDAs), introducing minimum nutrition, food safety and quality standards for suppliers seeking government co

item.title: SocGen Sees $76 Billion of JGB Buying If GPIF Rebalances Assets
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg Markets
item.description: Japan’s Government Pension Investment Fund has room to buy as much as ¥12.3 trillion ($76 billion) of additional government bonds without changing its asset allocation mix, according to Societe Generale SA, offering potential support for the debt market.

item.title: What to Know About Shein's Plans for Mega HK IPO
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg Markets
item.description: Fast-fashion giant Shein is seeking to list in Hong Kong as soon as August, targeting to raise about $2 billion to $3 billion, sources say. Minmin Low reports on the company's fundamentals. (Source: Bloomberg)

item.dc:creator: Bloomberg Markets
item.description: The Philippine peso falls toward a record low as escalating tensions in the Middle East drove oil prices higher, putting renewed pressure on the currency.

item.description: The Naira yesterday depreciated to N1,420 per dollar in the parallel market from N1,406 per dollar last weekend. The post Naira depreciates to N1,420/$ in parallel market appeared first on Vanguard News.

item.title: Uber’s product chief on hotels, robotaxis, and why the company doesn’t want to be “everything for everyone”
item.dc:creator: TechCrunch
item.description: Uber Chief Product Officer Sachin Kansal walks TechCrunch through the company's financial-services ambitions, its increasingly complicated relationship with Waymo, its new AV Labs data operation, and how AI is starting to show up in ways riders and drivers will actually notice.

item.title: The U.S. is maxing out its strategic oil reserves as Trump vows to control the Strait of Hormuz
item.dc:creator: MarketWatch
item.description: Strategic Petroleum Reserve stockpiles are precariously low and have been hit by major equipment failures, leaks and spills, according to a government report.

item.description: The social media site says it will amplify posts made by users' mutual followers' to give the feed more of a communal feel.

item.dc:creator: Bloomberg Markets

item.dc:creator: Bloomberg Markets
item.description: The private equity owner of Rawlings Sporting Goods Co., one of the oldest makers of baseball apparel and equipment, is exploring the sale of its stake in the company in an effort to tap booming investor demand for sports-related investments.

item.title: Show HN: Sx 2.0 – Share AI skills with your team through a Dropbox folder
item.dc:creator: Hacker News
item.description: Hi all, author here. SX started as a CLI to let developers share skills across AI clients without having to rely on git for storage. This allowed sharing at the Repo/Team/Org and Personal level.However, the more we spoke to users the more we realized that non-technical users were actually using skil

item.title: Middle East live: US strikes Iran for third night as Trump says deal still 'possible'
item.dc:creator: France 24
item.description: The United States launched a fresh salvo of strikes against Iran early Tuesday, marking a new escalation in the resumption of hostilities, even as US President Donald Trump said a deal with Tehran was still possible. Follow our liveblog for the latest updates.

item.title: Norway ‘rows’ at the royal palace to welcome back World Cup heroes
item.dc:creator: Al Jazeera
item.description: More than 100,000 people turned out to celebrate Norway's national football team after their World Cup exit.

item.title: Show HN: ContextVault – Shared memory layer for your AI and your team
item.dc:creator: Hacker News
item.description: Hi HN,I'm Kevin. I built ContextVault because I kept running into the same problem with AI tools.Every project accumulated prompts, coding conventions, architectural decisions, examples, and other pieces of context that made the models significantly more useful. The problem was that this information

item.title: RISING CASES OF MOB JUSTICE
item.dc:creator: ThisDay Editorial
item.description: Crime suspects should be given speedy trials The Kaduna State Police Command last week arrested six suspects over the lynching of two travellers who were mistaken for kidnappers by a

item.title: Dingyadi hails NSITF reforms, partnership with Gambia
item.dc:creator: Tribune
item.description: The Minister for Labour and Employment, Dr Muhammadu Maigari Dingyadi, has commended the Managing Director/CE of the Nigeria Social Insurance Trust Fund (NSITF), Barr. Oluwaseun Faleye, for the reforms he has instituted at the fund. He made the commendation when the Managing Director led the delegat

item.title: Dala Dry Inland Port Scandal: Court Affirms Rights Of Journalist Refusal Of Source Of Information
item.dc:creator: New Telegraph
item.description: A Federal High Court sitting in Kano has upheld the rights of Journalists in refusing to disclose the source of their information, unless in a matter of breach of National Security or has a direct link to the case. In the same vein, the court affirmed its powers to subpoena a journalist to give evid

item.title: An Englishwoman who sketched India before photography took hold
item.dc:creator: Hacker News
item.description: Article URL: https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cm2drrv6q54o Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=48900191 Points: 47 # Comments: 8

item.title: Trump says to deliver 'speech to the nation' Thursday as Iran tensions escalate
item.dc:creator: France 24
item.description: US President Donald Trump said on Monday he will deliver a prime-time address to the nation on Thursday, without disclosing the topic. The announcement came hours after Trump said he would reimpose a US naval blockade on Iran and impose a 20% fee on ships transiting the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: Spurs latest: Inter Milan interested in Spence
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football

item.title: I’m 67 with a $140,000 pension. Should I wait until 70 to claim Social Security so my wife gets more?
item.dc:creator: MarketWatch
item.description: “When I pass, all my retirement income is reduced to $30,000 a year.”
